response: Wilmington International Airport is closer to the Atlantic Ocean than Texarkana Regional Airport. Wilmington International Airport is located just north of Wilmington, North Carolina, and is approximately 30 miles (50 km) from Philadelphia, which is along the Atlantic coast. Texarkana Regional Airport, on the other hand, is located in Miller County, Arkansas, and is about 3 miles east of State Line Avenue, far from the Atlantic Ocean.
